answers: Conservation = protecting biodiversity, habitats, and natural resources. Preventing extinction and ecosystem destruction.
Ways to help: reduce consumption, support conservation organizations, volunteer, reduce plastic, and spread awareness.
Current efforts: national parks, marine reserves, captive breeding programs, anti-poaching patrols, and reforestation.
Poribesh rokkha: gach lagao, plastic komao, pani bachao, wildlife protect koro, ar awareness chhorao.
